ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, condominium) */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Lot size of the property in acres */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., for sale, sold, under contract) */,
  "basement" TEXT /* Indicates whether the property has a basement and its size */,
  "garage" TEXT /* Indicates whether the property has a garage and its size */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the property */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the neighborhood the property is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the neighborhood */,
  "school_quality" TEXT /* Quality of local schools (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "transportation_options" TEXT /* Transportation options available in the neighborhood (e.g., public transportation, parking, bike-friendly) */,
  "nearby_amenities" TEXT /* Nearby amenities (e.g., parks, grocery stores, restaurants) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "median_house_value" REAL /* Median house value in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transport_availability" TEXT /* Availability of public transport in the neighborhood (e.g., bus, train) */,
  "walk_score" REAL /* Walk score of the neighborhood */,
  "bike_score" REAL /* Bike score of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "property_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., pool, fireplace, backyard) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature (e.g., yes, no, size) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Current status of the feature (e.g., functional, needs repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the sale belongs to */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent involved in the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the owner owns */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner started owning the property */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner stopped owning the property (if applicable) */,
  "is_primary_residence" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the property is the owner's primary residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_owners_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency the agent works for */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the real estate business */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* Agent's specialties (e.g., commercial, residential) */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Agent's ratings from clients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the listing belongs to */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent the listing belongs to */,
  "list_price" REAL /* List price of the property */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the listing (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the listing has been viewed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the listing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, owner) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences (e.g., preferred communication methods) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
